title: Reset Anvil Cost
description: A simple plugin to reset the repair cost of an item to a lower level to avoid the "Too Expensive!" text from Minecraft
body:
# ﻿Reset Anvil Repair Cost
**Avoid the annoying ``Too Expensive!`` text**

**Supported Versions:** *1.20 and above*

This simple plugin ensures that the Repair Cost of any item remains within the allowed limit set in the configuration file.

Since that limit is enforced client-side, the current solution is to cap the repair cost of items at 40 levels

---
**Commands:**
> Command to reload the configuration file
> ``/anvilresetcost reload``

---

**Permissions:**
> Permission for Players to be able to use the plugin
> ``resetrepaircost.user``
> 
> Permission to reload the configuration file
> ``resetrepaircost.admin``

---

> **If an item has already surpassed the Repair Cost limit and/or is already showing the "Too Expensive!" text, you can revert it to the Adjusted Cost by simply clicking on the item while it is in the Anvil Slot.**

![Example of an Item being used in the Anvil](https://i.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExaGFqd2Myb2U2dDdpY2hiNGU2cDducGgzNmsyM29oa3c3ZmF2bG1idiZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/o485J1npDzfUIeKKym/giphy.gif)
